name: checkbox
title: Checkbox
description: Native input[type=checkbox] with token-driven marks and restored platform appearance in forced colors, a required visible label that doubles as the 44px pointer target, optional linked description and alignment, and native indeterminate support.
useWhen: Toggling a single independent yes/no choice (accept terms, subscribe)
Selecting any number of options from a list (multi-select)
Representing a parent select-all over child options (indeterminate state)
avoidWhen: Choosing exactly one option from a set (use radio-group)
An on/off setting that applies immediately with no form submit (a switch reads better)
Triggering an immediate action (use a button)

keyboard: Tab moves focus to the checkbox; Shift+Tab moves away
Space toggles between checked and unchecked (an indeterminate checkbox becomes checked)
A disabled checkbox is removed from the tab order
All behavior is the native input's own - nothing is re-implemented in script
accessibility.targetSize: 44px project default (the padded label row is the pointer target)
